emails.subject: Allocations
emails.body: It is now official!!! Effective August 1, 2000, Research is part of ENA. Can you review the attached file and let me know if we need to update the allocation? Also, can you tell me which Commercial Teams in ENA does Research support? If you have any questions, please call me at 5-7094. Thanx. Forwarded by Becky Pham/HOU/ECT on 08/17/2000 03:18 PM Vince J Kaminski 04/26/2000 01:12 PM
